page.content: In the table, the column headers are Province, PCI within 60 minutes n (% per province), and PCI within 120 minutes n (% per province). For Gauteng, the values are 12.27 mil (99.7) for PCI within 60 minutes and 12.27 mil (99.7) for PCI within 120 minutes. The Western Cape shows 4.19 mil (71.9) within 60 minutes and 4.78 mil (82) within 120 minutes.

page.content: The Northern Cape has 0 (0) for both timeframes. In the Eastern Cape, the values are 1.22 mil (18.6) within 60 minutes and 1.48 mil (22.6) within 120 minutes. The North West reports 0.66 mil (18.8) within 60 minutes and 1.93 mil (55) within 120 minutes. KwaZulu-Natal has 4.78 mil (46.6) for PCI within 60 minutes and 6.72 mil (65.4) for PCI within 120 minutes. The Free State presents 0.82 mil (29.9) within 60 minutes and 1.81 mil (65.9) within 120 minutes. Mpumalanga shows 0.73 mil (18.1) within 60 minutes and 3.13 mil (77.5) within 120 minutes. Limpopo reports 6 000 (0.1) within 60 minutes and 0.26 mil (4.9) within 120 minutes. The overall total is 24.6 mil (47.8) for PCI within 60 minutes and 32.6 mil (63.0) for PCI within 120 minutes, representing the total n (% SA).
